title: Beef Burger with Savory Croation Sauce
description: A classic beef burger elevated by a rich and savory Croatian-inspired sauce. Perfect for a casual dinner or lunch.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Form the ground beef into 4 patties, about 1/4 inch thick.
3. Grill the patties for 5-7 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 160°F.
4. Meanwhile, toast the burger buns on the grill.
5. Assemble the burgers with lettuce, tomatoes, cheese (if using), onions, pickles, and a dollop of mayonnaise.
6. To make the savory Croatian sauce, melt the Velveeta cheese in a saucepan over low heat.
7. Add the mayonnaise and Burger Seasoning to the melted cheese and stir until combined.
8. Serve the sauce on top of the burgers.
